result.stdout:
Usage: PMFTool [command]

PMFTool

Commands:
  run            
  pack           
  update-dlls    

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version

Usage: PMFTool [command]

PMFTool

Commands:
  run            
  pack           
  update-dlls    

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version

result.stdout:
Usage: PMFTool pack [--output-dir <String>] [--format <PackFormat>] [--help] path

PMFTool

Arguments:
  0: path    The path to the project directory of the mod you want to pack

Options:
  --output-dir <String>    The directory to put the generated file into
  --format <PackFormat>    The format to generate the package in (Default: Pmfm) (Allowed values: Zip, Pmfm)
  -h, --help               Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: PMFTool pack [--output-dir <String>] [--format <PackFormat>] [--help] path

PMFTool

Arguments:
  0: path    The path to the project directory of the mod you want to pack

Options:
  --output-dir <String>    The directory to put the generated file into
  --format <PackFormat>    The format to generate the package in (Default: Pmfm) (Allowed values: Zip, Pmfm)
  -h, --help               Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: PMFTool run [--mode <RunMode>] [--novr] [--start-slot <Int32>] [--nobuild] [--detach] [--help] path

PMFTool

Arguments:
  0: path    The path to the project directory of the mod you want to run

Options:
  --mode <RunMode>        The mode to run in (Default: Debug) (Allowed values: Debug, Release)
  --novr                  Enables the fly cam
  --start-slot <Int32>    The slot to start the game in set to -1 to start in menu (Default: -1)
  --nobuild               Disables rebuilding the project before running it
  --detach                If set don't attach to the Primitier process
  -h, --help              Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: PMFTool run [--mode <RunMode>] [--novr] [--start-slot <Int32>] [--nobuild] [--detach] [--help] path

PMFTool

Arguments:
  0: path    The path to the project directory of the mod you want to run

Options:
  --mode <RunMode>        The mode to run in (Default: Debug) (Allowed values: Debug, Release)
  --novr                  Enables the fly cam
  --start-slot <Int32>    The slot to start the game in set to -1 to start in menu (Default: -1)
  --nobuild               Disables rebuilding the project before running it
  --detach                If set don't attach to the Primitier process
  -h, --help              Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: PMFTool update-dlls [--noprompts] [--help] path

PMFTool

Arguments:
  0: path    The path to project directory of the mod you want to update the dlls for

Options:
  --noprompts    Answers yes to all prompts
  -h, --help     Show help message
